lede: A look at May 30 through the almanac — historic events, famous birthdays including CeeLo Green and Emperor Renzong of Song, and the day's notable deaths and observances.

events.title: Donald Trump
events.desc: Donald Trump is convicted of falsifying business records in his New York trial, the first time a former President of the United States has been found guilty in a criminal case.

events.title: Convention on Cluster Munitions
events.desc: Convention on Cluster Munitions is adopted.

events.title: Buddhist crisis
events.desc: A protest against pro-Catholic discrimination during the Buddhist crisis is held outside South Vietnam's National Assembly, the first open demonstration during the eight-year presidency of Ngo Dinh Diem.

events.title: Auckland Harbour Bridge
events.desc: The Auckland Harbour Bridge, crossing the Waitemata Harbour in Auckland, New Zealand, is officially opened by Governor-General Charles Lyttelton, 10th Viscount Cobham.

events.title: World War II
events.desc: World War II: Manolis Glezos and Apostolos Santas climb the Athenian Acropolis and tear down the German flag.

events.title: Lincoln Memorial
events.desc: The Lincoln Memorial is dedicated in Washington, D.C.

events.title: Bedřich Smetana
events.desc: Bedrich Smetana's comic opera The Bartered Bride premieres in Prague.

events.title: Kansas–Nebraska Act
events.desc: The Kansas–Nebraska Act becomes law, establishing the U.S. territories of Kansas and Nebraska.

events.title: Johann Sebastian Bach
events.desc: Johann Sebastian Bach assumes the office of Thomaskantor in Leipzig, presenting his first new cantata, Die Elenden sollen essen, BWV 75, in the St. Nicholas Church on the first Sunday after Trinity.

events.title: Hundred Years' War
events.desc: Hundred Years' War: In Rouen, France, the 19-year-old Joan of Arc is burned at the stake by an English-dominated tribunal.

births.name: Benny Goodman
births.line: American clarinet player, songwriter, and bandleader

deaths.text: Tatsuo Shimabuku, Japanese martial artist, founded Isshin-ryū
Joan of Arc, French martyr and saint

observances.text: Anguilla Day, commemorates the beginning of the Anguillian Revolution in 1967. (Anguilla)
Christian feast day: Basil the Elder and Emmelia of Caesarea
Christian feast day: Ferdinand III of Castile and León
